title: Flow 1L Screen Wash Concentrate – All Season Windscreen Cleaner – Protects to -5°C – Intensive Cleaning Formula – Removes Dirt, Insects & Grime – Dilutable Car Screenwash Solution – Made in UK
features: ALL-SEASON FORMULA: Specially formulated screen wash concentrate providing protection down to -5°C whilst maintaining powerful cleaning performance throughout the year
CONCENTRATED SOLUTION: Economical 1L bottle that can be diluted with water to create multiple litres of effective screen wash solution
SUPERIOR CLEANING: Removes stubborn road grime, insect residue, traffic film, and grease from windscreens for crystal-clear visibility
UNIVERSAL COMPATIBILITY: Suitable for all vehicle types including cars, vans, and trucks, with a gentle formula that's safe for wiper blades and washer systems
BRITISH QUALITY: Manufactured in the UK to exacting standards, delivering reliable and streak-free cleaning performance for your windscreen
description: Product description Keep your windscreen crystal clear in all weather conditions with Flow Screen Wash Concentrate. This versatile 1L solution offers protection down to -5°C, making it perfect for year-round use. The powerful concentrated formula efficiently removes stubborn road grime, insect residue, traffic film, and dirt, leaving your windscreen spotlessly clean without any streaks or smears. Simply dilute with water according to your needs - one bottle makes multiple litres of screen wash, offering excellent value for money. Compatible with all vehicle types including cars, vans, trucks, and motorhomes, this screen wash is carefully formulated to be gentle on your vehicle's paintwork, wiper blades, and washer systems. The intensive cleaning action ensures optimal visibility in all driving conditions, while the concentrated format helps reduce plastic waste. Manufactured in the UK, this reliable screen wash solution delivers professional-grade cleaning performance for your vehicle maintenance needs. Ingredients ethanediol, ethylene glycol Safety Warning Be careful not to contaminate nearby water/drains with the product, since it is harmful to aquatic life. Wash out your spray bottle after use.
